title: Implement user login with google
requirement: Implement user login with google use firebase

userStories.title: Google Login Integration
userStories.story: As a user, I want to log in using my Google account via Firebase, so that I can access the application securely without creating a new password.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given I am on the login page, When I click the 'Sign in with Google' button, Then I should be redirected to the Google authentication page.
Given I successfully authenticate with my Google account, When I am redirected back to the application, Then I should be logged in and see my user dashboard.
Given I cancel or deny access on the Google authentication page, When I am redirected back to the application, Then I should see an error message and remain logged out.
Given I am already logged in with Google, When I revisit the application, Then I should remain logged in without needing to authenticate again.
Given I am logged in with Google, When I click the 'Logout' button, Then I should be logged out and redirected to the login page.

testCases.title: Successful Google Login
testCases.steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Click the 'Sign in with Google' button.
3. Authenticate with valid Google credentials.
4. Grant access to the application.
testCases.expectedResult: User is redirected to the dashboard and is logged in.

testCases.title: Google Login Cancelled
testCases.steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Click the 'Sign in with Google' button.
3. On the Google authentication page, click 'Cancel' or deny access.
testCases.expectedResult: User is redirected back to the login page with an error message and remains logged out.

testCases.title: Session Persistence After Login
testCases.steps:
1. Log in using Google authentication.
2. Close the browser or tab.
3. Reopen the application URL.
testCases.expectedResult: User remains logged in and is taken directly to the dashboard.

testCases.title: Logout After Google Login
testCases.steps:
1. Log in using Google authentication.
2. Click the 'Logout' button.
testCases.expectedResult: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

testCases.title: Login Button Visibility
testCases.expectedResult: 'Sign in with Google' button is visible and clickable.
